scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Copper corrects to ~$4.00/lb (China property air-pocket + mid-cycle reversion), the Grasberg ramp slips, unit costs inflate, and FCX de-rates to ~16x on a halved ~$2.30 EPS - the operating + multiple double-derate toward the 52-week low.
scenarios.narrative_long: A China-property-led demand air-pocket and a broad slowdown pull copper to a $4.00 mid-cycle; with ~$400M EBITDA per $0.10/lb, EBITDA falls toward ~$10-11B. Grasberg's block-cave ramp slips further (geotechnical), and unit cash cost inflates above $2.10/lb on lower volumes. The market de-rates the peak-cycle premium to ~16x as the cycle turns. EPS ~$2.30; price toward the 52-week-low region.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 16x P/E on a depressed copper-cycle EPS ~ the peak-cycle multiple de-rate; approaches the 52-week low $35.15 / bear-floor $36-42.

eps_bridge.label: Copper corrects to ~$4.00/lb (~$8B EBITDA hit at $400M/$0.10)
eps_bridge.source_tag: S1: FCX $400M EBITDA per $0.10/lb sensitivity; S4 Goldman 2026 decline

eps_bridge.label: Grasberg ramp slips further (block-cave geotechnical)
eps_bridge.source_tag: S2: GBC restart sequence already cut 3.4->3.1 Blb

eps_bridge.label: Unit cash cost inflation on lower volumes (>$2.10/lb)
eps_bridge.source_tag: S1: FY26 unit cost guide raised $1.75->$1.95/lb

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Copper normalizes to ~$4.75/lb (Goldman base), Grasberg recovers slowly, the multiple compresses to ~17x on ~$2.95 EPS - the stock works back toward the conservative-Street cluster.
scenarios.narrative_long: Copper mean-reverts toward management's $5 modeling floor / Goldman's base; EBITDA settles ~$11-12B. Grasberg recovers but slower than the revised plan; costs stay elevated. The premium partially erodes to ~17x on a $2.95 FY27E EPS - near the conservative-Street PT cluster (~$50).
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 17x ~ partial de-rate on a mid-cycle copper EPS; consistent with the conservative-Street cluster (~$46-50).

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Copper holds ~$5.50/lb (elevated but off peak), Grasberg recovers on the revised 2027 ramp, leaching scales, and FCX holds ~18.5x on $3.58 EPS - essentially fully valued at spot.
scenarios.narrative_long: Copper stays elevated (~$5.50, between spot $6.19 and $4.50 mid-cycle) as the structural deficit offsets China softness; Grasberg recovers per the revised plan (Blocks 2&3 Q2'26, full 2027), leaching scales toward ~300 Mlb, and the balance sheet funds the performance-based payout. FY27E EPS ~$3.58; the stock holds ~18.5x - roughly where it trades now (~17x FY27E) - i.e., fully valued at spot with no margin of safety.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 18.5x ~ in line with the current ~17x FY27E forward; a mid-cycle multiple on an elevated-but-off-peak copper EPS. Fully valued.

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Copper holds ~$6.25/lb on the deficit, Grasberg fully recovers in 2027, leaching + tariff benefit lift EPS to ~$4.20, and FCX re-rates to ~19.5x as the structural-copper bull is validated.
scenarios.narrative_long: The structural deficit keeps copper near spot/record; Grasberg fully recovers to ~1.7 Blb in 2027, leaching reaches its targets, and a US refined-copper tariff lifts realized US prices. EPS ~$4.20 and the market re-rates modestly to ~19.5x as the copper-leader premium is validated.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 19.5x = modest re-rate on a high-copper EPS; toward the higher-end Street PTs (Goldman $75 / Barclays $77).

eps_bridge.label: Grasberg full 2027 recovery + leaching ~300 Mlb + US tariff benefit
eps_bridge.source_tag: S2/S3: GBC recovery + leaching targets + Section 232

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Copper supercycle to ~$7.50/lb (deficit bites), Grasberg + Bagdad/El Abra growth + leaching to 800 Mlb drive EPS to ~$5.00, and FCX re-rates to ~21x.
scenarios.narrative_long: A structural supply shortfall (declining grades, thin pipeline, electrification + AI-grid demand) drives copper to a supercycle ~$7.50/lb; Grasberg recovers, the leaching 'virtual mine' scales to ~800 Mlb, and Bagdad/El Abra expansions advance. EPS ~$5.00 and the market awards ~21x.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 21x approaches a pure-play-copper premium on a supercycle EPS; tail re-rate predicated on a durable structural deficit.

eps_bridge.label: Leaching to ~800 Mlb + Bagdad/El Abra growth pipeline
eps_bridge.source_tag: S2/S3: leaching 800 Mlb target + brownfield expansions

headline.headline_text: FCX at $66.20 carries a probability-weighted 12-month expected return of -2.5% (source-conditional Hold); the call is conditional on the copper price (~$6.19/lb, the dominant S4 driver) holding near spot and on the Grasberg block-cave recovering on the revised 2026-2027 ramp - scenario-weighted range strong_bear $36.80 (-44.4%) to strong_bull $105.00 (+58.6%). FCX is fully valued at its 52-week high on peak-cycle copper (~40-55% above mid-cycle) with consensus PTs only ~+4-6% above spot; the distribution is left-skewed, but the structural copper-deficit tail keeps it a Hold, not a Sell.
